scripts.copy-app-from-cmake: rm -rf 'Video simili duplicate cleaner.app' && cp -R './build/Video simili duplicate cleaner.app' 'Video simili duplicate cleaner.app'
scripts.build-cmake: npm run cmake-configure && npm run cmake-build && npm run copy-app-from-cmake && npm run macdeploy
scripts.build-binaries-cmake: npm run build-cmake && npm run sign-and-package
scripts.sign-and-package: cp Info.plist 'Video simili duplicate cleaner.app/Contents/Info.plist' && npm run sign-app && npm run package-app
scripts.sign-app: codesign --deep --force --sign 'Apple Distribution: THEOPHANE MAYAUD (XZ4FY5SXW7)' --entitlements parent.plist --options=runtime --timestamp 'Video simili duplicate cleaner.app'
scripts.package-app: productbuild --component 'Video simili duplicate cleaner.app' /Applications --sign '3rd Party Mac Developer Installer: THEOPHANE MAYAUD (XZ4FY5SXW7)' --timestamp 'Video simili duplicate cleaner.pkg'
scripts.delete-apps: rm -rf 'Video simili duplicate cleaner.app' && rm -rf 'Video simili duplicate cleaner.pkg' && rm -f 'Video simili duplicate cleaner.dmg'
scripts.clean-cmake: npm run cmake-clean && npm run clean-leftovers-cmake
